name: rc-artifacts
description: A personal marketplace of reusable Claude Code assets, distilled from patterns proven across real projects. Grows over time — each proven pattern becomes an installable plugin.

plugins.name: cto-kit
plugins.description: Solo-founder engineering discipline: adversarial security gate, AWS cost guardian, CTO orchestrator, and cross-session memory hygiene.

plugins.name: qa-kit
plugins.description: Test & QA discipline: an end-to-end verifier that never claims an unrun pass, plus a strictly read-only live-production sentinel.

plugins.name: design-kit
plugins.description: Frontend design-system discipline: a token-first/dark-mode-first/RTL-safe/zero-CLS/CSP-safe design steward and a WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility gate.
